title: DazNode - Your Lightning Network Portal
description: DazNode is a Bitcoin Lightning Network explorer that allows you to visualize and analyze the network in real-time.

hero.title: Optimize your performance and profitability with Daznode
hero.description: Daznode is an AI-powered intelligent dashboard designed to optimize your Lightning Network node and maximize its profitability.

items.title: Real-Time Analysis
items.description: Track the evolution of the Lightning Network with real-time updates of nodes and channels.

items.title: Fee Optimization
items.description: Adjust the fees of your most active channels to maximize your revenue.

items.title: Liquidity Management
items.description: Rebalance your channels to optimize available liquidity.

items.title: AI Assistant
items.description: Ask questions to the AI assistant who will help you understand and optimize your Lightning node.

dashboard.title: Your Lightning node dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor and optimize your node's performance in real-time

items.quote: Thanks to Daznode's recommendations, my node went from a few transactions per day to over 100! The difference is impressive.
items.author: Marie L.

items.quote: Daznode transformed my Lightning node from a hobby into a real source of income. I can't do without it anymore!
items.author: Pierre D.

items.question: What is DazNode?
items.answer: DazNode is an AI-powered intelligent dashboard designed to optimize your Lightning Network node and maximize its profitability.

items.question: How can DazNode help me?
items.answer: DazNode analyzes your node and the Lightning Network to provide you with personalized optimization recommendations, helping you increase your revenue and improve your node's performance.

cta.title: Ready to optimize your Lightning node?
cta.description: Join DazNode today and discover how to maximize your node's performance.
